194 Efhot SamhitU
The Moon presides over mountain-fortresses, natural water-
barriers, Kosala, Bharukaccha, the ocean, Romans, Tocharians,
Vanavasins (forest-dwellers or people of Banavasi), TaAgana, Hala,
Strirajya, the islands of the great ocean, sweet things, flowers, fruits,
water, salt, jewels, conch shells, pearls, aquatic products, rice, bar-
ley, herbs, wheat, drinkers of Soma juice, Kings called Akranda (in
the cycle of 12 kings they occupy the position next to the Parsni-
graha), Brahmanas, white objects (like silver), beloved persons,
horses, lovers, young women, commandants, eatables, clothes,
horned animals, demons, agriculturists and persons learned in the
